item.title: LFOT METAR/TAF
item.description:
🟢 METAR LFOT 010930Z AUTO 18004KT 070V240 CAVOK 19/13 Q1022 NOSIG
🟡 TAF LFOT 010500Z 0106/0206 20005KT 9999 SCT050 PROB30 TEMPO 0106/0107 3000 BR BKN004 TEMPO 0112/0119 -SHRA BKN040TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0115/0119 VRB10G20KT 4000 -TSRA SCT050CB PROB40 TEMPO 0200/0203 -SHRA SCT050TCU PROB30 TEMPO 0200/0203 4000 -TSRA FEW050CB
